productDisplayName: Fila Men's Basic Low Navy Shoe
description: This pair of navy blue lace-up shoes from the Basic Low range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and inkfruit tees and create a stir wherever you go.Uppers Navy blue canvas uppers with grey lining gives great protection and great style White lace-ups ensures a snug Fit Additonal pair of navy blue laces for different look Embroidered logo on the side of the heel Lightly cushioned insole gives greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Diagonal grooves on outsole ensures greater grip and stability fila branding on the arch Toe guard for greater protection Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
